## SAF1.1. Effectiveness of Safety Management (EoSM) (KPI#1)

In 2025, ANS CR achieved the planned maturity levels set out in its performance plan for all five components of the EoSM.

As described in the monitoring report, all components of the EoSM reached the required level. All the achieved levels were verified by NCA/NSA CZ during the assessment and audit held in March 2026.

As for the measures put in place to achieve the safety performance targets, the monitoring report states that requirements for training in safety, safety culture, human performance and just culture have been updated within the Safety Management Manual. Just Culture training is now done once in 3 years for all staff, including the managers. The employee receives the appropriate level of the training based on his/her position.
